pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 12 creates mailbox with name 'IT Support' and email 'itsupport@helpdesk.local'
setup_task.sh line 28 inserts saved_replies with name='Password Reset Instructions'
task.json description line 5, step 4: 'Change the name to: SSO Password Reset Guide'
task.json description line 5, step 1: '1. Go to https://sso.company.com/reset'
task.json description line 5: 'Your new password must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.'
task.json description line 5: 'Best regards, IT Support Team'
setup_task.sh line 25 OLD_BODY: '1. Navigate to https://legacy.internal.corp/reset' - this is the outdated URL that must be removed

pi_items.verified_value: FreeScout (open-source help desk, self-hosted PHP/Laravel application)
pi_items.source: install_freescout.sh, setup_freescout.sh use Docker image 'tiredofit/freescout:latest' and MariaDB. FreeScout is verified as real open-source software at https://freescout.net/

pi_items.verified_value: Saved Replies feature in FreeScout mailbox
pi_items.source: task.json requires editing saved reply in mailbox. FreeScout documentation confirms saved replies are mailbox-specific feature at https://freescout.net/module/saved-replies/

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on FreeScout, an open-source help desk system. It requires editing an existing saved reply named 'Password Reset Instructions' in the 'IT Support' mailbox to rename it to 'SSO Password Reset Guide' and update its body content. The new content must contain 'sso.company.com/reset', 'at least 12 characters', and 'IT Support Team', while removing the outdated URL 'legacy.internal.corp/reset'. All test data is synthetic and generated by setup scripts. The task difficulty is medium and allows up to 25 steps with a 300-second timeout.
